heading: Exclusive right to name
label: 22505 Exclusive right to name
text: The corporation and its State, territorial, and local subdivisions have the exclusive right to use the name “American War Mothers”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2250536:100., .Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 303, § 1043 Stat. 968The words “to have” are omitted as included in “to use”. The words “in carrying out its business purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
